hook.text: Six people die every day in the US from alcohol poisoning. Most are middle-aged men.

buildup.text: The liver can process about one standard drink per hour. Binge drinking overwhelms it.

discovery.text: Alcohol suppresses the brainstem, slowing breathing and heart rate to dangerous levels.

twist.text: Blood alcohol continues to rise after the last drink as the stomach absorbs remaining alcohol.

climax.text: Putting someone 'to sleep' on their back risks aspiration if they vomit while unconscious.

punchline.text: Recovery position. Call for help. Don't leave them alone. That's the protocol.

quiz.question: Why does blood alcohol continue to rise after the last drink?
options: The stomach continues absorbing alcohol already consumed
